## How was it tested?

<!-- Commands run, scenarios exercised, devices/emulators used. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes (or relevant module tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or populated state DBs committed
